reviews.review_description: Does not launch anymore on Oculus Go.
This was very enjoyable. I shared it with my family and friends they love it.

A true treasure! The First Family's insight filled conversation  about the appreciated history and elegance of the Presidential Residence. The sensation of personal interaction with the President and First Lady supercedes television's best interviews.
It's really nice to educate us in such great and innovative idea

Tried to download multiple times, but it kept failing. After just trying again, I was able to see the above error code in the app. Since I can't experience the app, I have to give it a one star. Will update if the devs resolve this issue.

It took about 10 minutes to download, but it was worth it for the high quality. I've viewed the same experience streamed instead of downloaded before, but that was nowhere near the clarity of these visuals. The controls were not working apart from being able to pause and resume, but it didn't spoil the overall experience.
BHO can't resist being overtly political, but very cool nonetheless. Quite worth the trouble to download instead of streaming.
This was the best VR walkthrough I've ever done I love the White House it's beautiful and I love the Obamas.

reviews.review_title: The most amazing thing I've ever seen
reviews.review_description: I have to say the is the most amazing app I have seen thus far . It made me feel happy, hopeful, PROUD and included in a world I would normally feel i don't belong. I love history and seeing different and rare things and this app gave me just that.  I love the Obamas so much. I literally want to cry.  I Love them for sharing their home, our home with us. I may never get to go to DC but now I feel like I've been there. I love it. Wish I could give more stars.
When the data file is moved to SD card, the program actually has to be coded to check there for the file.  Otherwise it's useless to allow moving it in the first place.

I love this app. It's visually stunning, but there is an issue with the audio. The narrative is doubled up and garbled. It ruins the experience. If that can be corrected is give this an A+. Update: 10/9/17. Found out this app is not Bluetooth compatible. When I used  wired headphones the audio was perfect. Might just be my wireless headphones, (not all), but FYI.

reviews.review_title: Love the stereo, true work of art
reviews.review_description: The attention to detail was absolutely well rewarded, the stereo and stitching exemplifies the VR/360 medium so well, it's every bit we want VR to be.

I cannot get this to install. It just sits there and says 0 of 4.6 gb... Is this normal and will it all of a sudden show a larger ratio of installed after a while. I've tried several times. I have over 39 gb available on phone and storage card. I'd love to be able to give this 5 like others. Oh and I have a S8.

Tried to download this thing from 1030 am it is now 434pm this is not worth all the time I put in to try to see it. Should have to take up a whole day to try to see anything on here. Tried to watch again it says it is downloaded but still can't watch. Why doesn't the people that put these games online help you with the problems you rub into so everybody can watch it. Isn't that what the reviews are for? Or don't they care?

reviews.review_title: Best thing ever seen in vr
reviews.review_description: Love every sight of white house. Feel like I am in white house . Thank you creator of this video
